title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 229.370 - Penalty
text:
229.370.  Penalty. — Any person, firm or corporation violating the provisions of sections 229.300 to 229.370 or failing to comply therewith shall, upon conviction thereof, be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor.  The provisions of sections 229.300 to 229.370 shall apply only to counties of class one, and any and all laws or parts of laws in conflict herewith are hereby repealed.
(RSMo 1939 § 8654, A.L. 1945 p. 1489) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8005
